item.title: Reimagining Mastermyr Viking Hinges
item.description: A calm look at reimagining Mastermyr Viking hinges, with a focus on blacksmithing process, shaping metal, and traditional shop craftsmanship.

item.title: Blacksmith's Twist: Forging a Metal Puzzle
item.description: A blacksmith’s twist shown through careful forging and shaping, turning metal into a satisfying puzzle-inspired form.

item.title: The Old Forge, New Life
item.description: An old forge is brought back into use, highlighting restoration, craftsmanship, and the continued tradition of blacksmithing.

item.description: A new forging project gets underway as raw steel is shaped and prepared using traditional blacksmithing techniques and workshop tools.
